signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Leads Polymarket Activity | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Leads Polymarket Activity | NO | HIGH confidence**

Polymarket's most active market as of April 20, 2026, is "Elon Musk # tweets April 14 - April 21, 2026?", with the 220-239 tweet range priced at 76% probability (up from 70-71% in recent snapshots), reflecting real-time trader sentiment amid ongoing trading volume over $27M across tweet markets[1][2][3]. signals.headline: Lakers Lose Luka Dončić and Austin Reaves for Rest of Regular Season** | YES | MED confidence
signals.raw:
Lakers Lose Luka Dončić and Austin Reaves for Rest of Regular Season** | YES | MED confidence  
Los Angeles Lakers ruled out Luka Dončić and Austin Reaves for the regular season's remainder, prompting debate on whether LeBron James' season is effectively over; this occurred alongside Flagg's 92 points over his prior two games.[2] Confirms injury impacts that could shift playoff odds and prediction
